name: Health Almanac
description: An open, versioned index of public health data.

entries.title: Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS)
entries.description: The nation's premier system of health-related telephone surveys collecting state data on US residents' risk behaviors, chronic conditions, and use of preventive services.
entries.publisher: U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
entries.attribution: U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, BRFSS
entries.notes: Annual survey data released as SAS transport and ASCII files with documentation.

entries.title: PLACES: Local Data for Better Health
entries.description: Model-based small-area estimates of chronic disease measures, health behaviors, and prevention indicators for US counties, places, census tracts, and ZCTAs.
entries.publisher: U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
entries.attribution: U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, PLACES
entries.notes: Downloadable datasets are served via the CDC open data portal (data.cdc.gov).

entries.title: CDC WONDER
entries.description: CDC's Wide-ranging ONline Data for Epidemiologic Research — an integrated query system for dozens of public health datasets (mortality, natality, cancer, notifiable diseases, and environmental exposures).
entries.publisher: U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
entries.attribution: U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, CDC WONDER
entries.notes: Query-based access; sub-national counts are privacy-suppressed. The API uses an XML request format.

entries.title: WHO Global Health Observatory (GHO)
entries.description: The World Health Organization's portal for global health statistics — curated indicators on mortality, disease burden, health systems, and the determinants of health for WHO member states.
entries.attribution: World Health Organization, Global Health Observatory
entries.notes: Programmatic access via the GHO OData API (https://ghoapi.azureedge.net/api/). WHO data carries a non-commercial CC license — note this differs from the US-Gov public-domain entries.
